Promotion valid until 11:59 p.m. ET on Monday, December 12th, 2016 at the Official Democratic Store.

|

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3f9/4067b0a/22081b352/7e078a66/2802443038/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161211_dnc_f&source=em_20161211_dnc_f"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3f9/4067b0a/22081b352/7e078a67/2802443038/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161211_dnc_f&source=em_20161211_dnc_f"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3f9/4067b0a/22081b352/7e078a64/2802443038/VEsHBw/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161211_dnc_f&source=em_20161211_dnc_f") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3f9/4067b0a/22081b352/7e078a65/2802443038/VEsHBg/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161211_dnc_f&source=em_20161211_dnc_f"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: Investigate Trump's Ties to Russia Now
body:
There is growing evidence that **Russia** influenced the 2016 Presidential election to help Donald Trump, with the expectation that Trump would use the White House to help Russia in return.

This is the most serious possible charge against Donald Trump: that he is a Russian agent who will put Russian interests ahead of our own. This is the Constitution's "High Crime" of [Treason](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vVrOl/6/sK/r5cs/6LBd0Q/v7IkVzcOiV "Link: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Article_Three_of_the_United_States_Constitution#Section_3:_Treason").
**[We must demand an immediate and public investigation of Donald Trump's ties to Russia](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vVrOl/s/v6/r5cs/6LBd0Q/UAVgUonX0).**

President Obama warned top Senators of Russian interference before the election, but Senate Republican leader Mitch McConnell refused to challenge Russia [for partisan reasons](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vVrOl/v/sb/r5cs/6LBd0Q/yCMOKrp1L "Link: http://nymag.com/daily/intelligencer/2016/12/trump-mcconnell-putin-and-the-triumph-of-the-will-to-power.html").

Now Senate Republicans are [vaguely promising an investigation of Russia in 2017](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vVrOl/z/sO/r5cs/6LBd0Q/zDc7opnEqD "Link: https://www.washingtonpost.com/news/powerpost/wp/2016/12/08/republicans-ready-to-launch-wide-ranging-probe-of-russia-despite-trumps-stance/?utm_term=.887e091eea37"), **but that would be far too late**. If Russia helped Trump, the American people must find out in time for the [Electoral College to choose a different uncorrupted President on December 19](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vVrOl/U/sm/r5cs/6LBd0Q/v1JH3l7k4n "Link: http://democracy.us").

[**We therefore demand an immediate and public investigation of Russian interference in the 2017 Presidential election, as well as Russian influence over Donald Trump and his advisors.**](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vVrOl/j/v6/r5cs/6LBd0Q/9AvaE0JNb)

Unless this investigation is immediate and public, many Americans will conclude that Donald Trump is a Russian agent who could become a Traitor to the United States.
[**Please sign this petition**](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vVrOl/5/v6/r5cs/6LBd0Q/vY6fESjldW)and forward it to everyone you know who cares about Donald Trump's dangerous ties to Russia.
Thanks for all you do!
Bob Fertik
1\. Washington Post 12/9/16: [Secret CIA assessment says Russia was trying to help Trump win White House](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vVrOl/r/su/r5cs/6LBd0Q/s0i0oaqL9t "Link: https://www.washingtonpost.com/world/national-security/obama-orders-review-of-russian-hacking-during-presidential-campaign/2016/12/09/31d6b300-be2a-11e6-94ac-3d324840106c_story.html")
2\. New York Times 12/9/16: [Russian Hackers Acted to Aid Trump in Election, U.S. Says](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vVrOl/Y/vP/r5cs/6LBd0Q/U36SpvgM92 "Link: http://www.nytimes.com/2016/12/09/us/obama-russia-election-hack.html")

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](http://democrats.ontraport.com/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvMTAxLzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvNTYyNzk4NDU=)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276
